description: Archived resolved residual from V1.34 PR42 (cursor-pr42-stage-status). V1.35 P0 (commit 59e50bb) closed R-CURSOR-PR42-03 with a stage_status transition gate.

entries.title: FL-E stage_status gate bypass via status-only PATCH — reject direct status promotion without force=true
entries.source: Cursor security automation #351d19c7 (PR #42 revalidation RUN_ID bc-52739238, 2026-06-05) — NEW post-3b24aaf finding
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit 59e50bb) — check_stage_status_transition() rejects stage_status → complete/skipped without force=true when no current_stage; 3 new tests added (patch_work_stage_change_is_auditable, patch_work_invalid_stage_value_returns_400, patch_work_intake_status_independent_of_stage_status).
entries.closure_evidence: commit 59e50bb on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; works_api.rs 28 tests pass (was 18 before P0); clippy clean.
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit 59e50bb on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; works_api.rs 28 tests pass (was 18 before P0); clippy clean.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).
